mapper.select: SELECT noticeboard_number AS noticeBoardNumber, board_type AS boardType, board_title AS boardTitle, board_content AS boardContent, board_click AS boardClick, TO_CHAR(board_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS boardDate, admin_number AS adminNumber, contest_number AS contestNumber, file_number AS fileNumber FROM UB_NOTICEBOARD WHERE noticeboard_number = #{noticeBoardNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, n.* FROM ( SELECT noticeboard_number AS noticeBoardNumber, board_type AS boardType, board_title AS boardTitle, board_content AS boardContent, board_click AS boardClick, TO_CHAR(board_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS boardDate, admin_number AS adminNumber, contest_number AS contestNumber, file_number AS fileNumber FROM UB_NOTICEBOARD ORDER BY noticeboard_number DESC ) n ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT noticeboard_number AS noticeBoardNumber, board_type AS boardType, board_title AS boardTitle, board_content AS boardContent, board_click AS boardClick, TO_CHAR(board_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS boardDate, admin_number AS adminNumber, contest_number AS contestNumber, file_number AS fileNumber FROM UB_NOTICEBOARD WHERE contest_number = #{contestNumber} AND ROWNUM = 1
